meta.title: Refund Policy — vngoweb
meta.description: vngoweb refund policy for WebPro and Ultra plan upgrades paid via PayOS: eligibility, process and processing times.

title: Refund Policy
intro: This policy applies to WebPro Business and Ultra Brand plan upgrade transactions paid through the PayOS gateway on vngoweb.com.

sections.heading: 1. How cycle-based payments work
paragraphs: Each payment activates one full billing cycle (monthly or yearly) of your choosing. The system never charges you automatically on a recurring basis — you return and pay whenever you want to renew for another cycle.

sections.heading: 2. Cases eligible for a refund
list: You were charged but your plan was not activated due to a system error on vngoweb's side, and the issue could not be resolved after contacting support.
You were charged more than once for the same order.
The service suffered prolonged, continuous interruption caused entirely by vngoweb for the majority of the paid cycle.

sections.heading: 3. Cases not eligible for a refund
list: You have used the service in part or in full during the paid cycle and changed your mind about continuing.
Your account was suspended or terminated for violating the Terms of Service.
You selected the wrong plan or billing cycle and the transaction completed successfully — please double-check your details before confirming payment.

sections.heading: 4. How to request a refund
list: Send a request to hotro@vngoweb.com or call the hotline within 7 days of the transaction date, including the order ID shown in your payment history in the Dashboard.
vngoweb will verify and respond to your request within 3 business days.
If approved, the refund will be returned to the same payment method/account used for the PayOS transaction within 5–7 business days.

sections.heading: 5. Cancellation is not a refund
paragraphs: Cancelling auto-renewal does not entitle you to a refund of fees already paid for the current cycle — you retain full access to your plan's benefits until the end of the paid cycle.
